title: aira pungens
intro: Aira pungens, also known as Pungent Hairgrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira pungens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Aira pungens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
